description:
Advertise your Black Friday discounts with this neon Black Friday email template. Share your gym subscription or workout class discounts through this sleek, modern template.  
This email includes space for multiple CTA’s so you can describe the benefit of each product or service you’re advertising, linking readers directly to a product landing page.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
